syllabus.title: Linear Equations, Graphing, and Systems
sourceRefs: test-algebra2.txt: Algebra chapter: linear equations, graphing, systems

gaps.detail: Standard Algebra 2 curriculum typically includes quadratics, but no mention in provided documents.
gaps.recommendation: Teacher should provide scope for quadratic units if this is intended as a full-year Algebra 2 course.

gaps.detail: Core Algebra 2 topic not referenced in any document.
gaps.recommendation: Teacher should define polynomial unit scope or provide supporting materials.

pacing.notes: Only 3 weeks of content mapped; remaining time requires additional units (e.g., quadratics, polynomials, rational expressions, exponential/logarithmic functions, etc.) to constitute a full Algebra 2 curriculum.
